# LCA Desk

LCA Desk is the world's first AI-native Local Content Act (LCA) compliance platform for oil and gas sector companies.

## What We Do
LCA Desk provides software to manage mandatory Local Content Act filings across multiple jurisdictions. Our AI drafts compliance narratives, detects filing gaps, and generates Secretariat-ready reports automatically.

## Primary Market
Guyana — Local Content Act 2021, Local Content Secretariat, Version 4.1 guidelines. 5 mandatory submission types: H1 Half-Yearly Report (due Jul 30), H2 Half-Yearly Report (due Jan 30), Annual Local Content Plan, Local Content Master Plan, Annual Performance Report.

## Expanding Markets
Nigeria (NCDMB), Trinidad & Tobago (MEEI PLCC), Ghana (Petroleum Commission), Mozambique (INP), Namibia (Ministry of Mines and Energy).

## Products
- LCA Desk Software: Self-serve compliance platform. Lite $99/mo + $25/report, Pro $599/mo, Enterprise $1,999/mo.
- Full Service: Managed filing service from $2,500/month.
- 14-day free trial, full Pro access, no credit card required.

## AI Features
- AI Narrative Drafting: Drafts Comparative Analysis Reports from your data
- Compliance Gap Detection: Pre-submission risk scan
- Automatic Data Extraction: Upload payroll/procurement docs for AI field extraction
- Ask the LCA Expert: In-app AI assistant trained on LCA Act and v4.1 guidelines

## Company
Houston, Texas. Powered by Stabroek Advisory LLC. AI features powered by Claude (Anthropic).

## Contact
hello@lcadesk.com | lcadesk.com
